content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on course navigating the right-hand bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 51, target = 51 + 5 = 56
- Waypoint 56: (4.2557, 3.1701)
- Car position: (5.1614, 2.6592)
- Bearing = atan2(3.1701 - 2.6592, 4.2557 - 5.1614) = atan2(0.5109, -0.9057)
- = 180 - atan2(0.5109, 0.9057) = 180 - 29.41° = 150.59°
- Current heading: 170.75°
- Delta = 150.59 - 170.75 = -20.16° → right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta to target waypoint 56 is -20.16° confirming continued right turn, applying -20 steering at speed 1.0 to follow the waypoint line through the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight section heading ~180° (due west) along y≈2.77",
    "Right-curving section spans waypoints 48-58, delta consistently -18 to -23°",
    "Car is consistently ~0.10-0.17m left of center — slight left bias throughout",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for delta <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — 0.17m left of center is safe but watch for tightening",
    "Heading is ~171° (essentially due west-southwest), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta around -20° in this section confirms consistent right curve",
    "Speed 1.0 used for delta ~20-23°; reduce only for sharp turns >30° delta",
    "Waypoints 51-58 show gradual right curve continuing, maintain -20 steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.4822, 5.3762, 5.2864, 5.2215, 5.1614],
    "y": [2.6036, 2.6021, 2.6127, 2.6307, 2.6592],
    "yaw": [-176.100, -177.092, 179.597, 175.900, 170.748]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -20.16,
  "speed": 1.0,
  "steering_angle": -20.0
}
```
